mapper.select: SELECT d.cl_order_id, d.product_id, s.product_name, s.stock_qty, s.unit, d.order_qty, o.cl_delivery_date FROM client_order_detail d JOIN product_stock s ON d.product_id = s.product_id JOIN client_order o ON d.cl_order_id = o.cl_order_id WHERE o.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' AND d.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client_order WHERE cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED'

SELECT o.cl_order_id, o.client_id, o.cl_order_date, o.cl_delivery_date, o.cl_order_status, c.client_name FROM client_order o JOIN client c ON o.client_id = c.client_id WHERE o.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY cl_order_date DESC LIMIT #{perPageNum} OFFSET #{pageStart}

SELECT cod.cl_order_id, cod.product_id, p.product_name, cod.order_qty, IFNULL(ps.stock_qty, 0) AS stock_qty,
( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pp.planned_qty), 0) FROM production_plan pp WHERE pp.product_id = p.product_id AND pp.status = 'WAITING' ) AS reserved_qty
FROM client_order_detail cod JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_stock ps ON ps.product_id = p.product_id WHERE cod.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM production_plan pp WHERE pp.cl_order_id = cod.cl_order_id AND pp.product_id = cod.product_id )
SELECT CONCAT('PL-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', LPAD(IFNULL(MAX(SUBSTRING(plan_id, 12)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM production_plan WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT MAX(plan_id) FROM production_plan WHERE plan_id LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO production_plan ( plan_id, cl_order_id, product_id, planned_qty, priority, status, due_date, created_at ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{clOrderId}, #{productId}, #{plannedQty}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{dueDate}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT plan_id, cl_order_id, product_id, planned_qty, status AS plan_status, due_date, priority, created_at FROM production_plan ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}
